exec: //1. Contact OC IT team and Local Custom Service Team and provide your Company information(3PP Name, 3PP Type, 3PP Country/Region,etc)
//2. Register an OC test account on OC Stage environment(Sandbox) and get the OCID(https://fulfillment-stage.orangeconnex.com/seller/register),contact local team to verify your OC account.
//3. OC IT team will generate a unique keyset(client_id & Secret) for each 3PP.
//4. With the keyset(client_id & Secret) , you could start to call OC openAPI.
//5. When the development is done, contact OC IT team to generate a ClientKey & SecretKey on PROD environment. Then you could start the production validation.

query.description: all or state=10057014(register an OC account in Stage environment.)
